metadata.description: Best-in-class reference Claude Code plugins, authored and red-teamed with plugins-studio. Each is a self-contained worked example of the five-primitive component model (skill / agent / command / hook / MCP).

plugins.name: brand-studio
plugins.description: Build and evaluate brands grounded in cultural authority — strategy, identity, voice, stewardship — with an adversarial 14-critic council that runs as parallel isolated agents.

plugins.name: plugins-studio
plugins.description: Run the Claude Code plugin lifecycle against one 9-dimension architecture standard — component fit, boundary cohesion, dependency legality — judged by a 9-critic council that runs as parallel isolated agents. Build with /plugin-author·carve·edit; judge with /plugin-score·critique·promote. Bundles an advisory hook that validates plugin.json/marketplace.json on save (never blocks).
